ListItem.Para: EFIS/DSP panels operate normally.
Remaining display units operate normally.

MaintenanceNote.Para: The five display units are interchangeable.

ListItem.Para: Right PFD/MFD selector is verified to operate normally.
ISFD operates normally.
Touchpad cursor control devices (CCDs) operate normally.
EFIS/DSP panels operate normally.
Multifunction keypads (MFKs) operate normally.
Remaining display units operate normally.

Note.Para: For DISPLAY UNIT INTERFACE status message displayed, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 31-61-02-02.
The five display units are interchangeable.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the right PFD/MFD selector operates normally (AMM DDG 31-61-01).

ListItem.Para: Confirm that all positions of the right PFD/MFD selector operate normally.
Confirm that the NORM position operates normally:
Set the right PFD/MFD selector to NORM.
Confirm the right outboard display unit displays the PFD and the inboard display unit displays the MFD/EICAS format.
Confirm that the INBD position operates normally:
Set the right PFD/MFD selector to INBD.
Confirm the right inboard display unit displays the PFD/EICAS format and the outboard display unit blanks.
Confirm that the OUTBD position operates normally:
Set right PFD/MFD selector to OUTBD.
Confirm the right outboard display unit displays the PFD/EICAS format and the inboard display blanks.
Set right PFD/MFD selector to NORM.

OperationNote.Para: In the event of failure of additional display units, Head-Up Display (HUD) may be used to provide PFD information.

RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations require two Primary Flight Displays (PFD) with mini map (2 outboard DUs) and two Multi-Function Display (MFD) (2 inboard DUs) .

ListItem.Para: Right PFD/MFD selector is verified to operate normally.
ISFD operates normally.
Touchpad cursor control devices (CCDs) operate normally.
EFIS/DSP panels operate normally.
Multifunction keypads (MFKs) operate normally.
Remaining display units operate normally.

Note.Para: For DISPLAY UNIT INTERFACE status message displayed, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 31-61-02-02.
The five display units are interchangeable.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify right PFD/MFD selector operates normally (AMM DDG 31-61-01).

ListItem.Para: Confirm that all positions of the right PFD/MFD selector operate normally.
Confirm that the NORM position operates normally:
Set the right PFD/MFD selector to NORM.
Confirm the right outboard display unit displays the PFD and the inboard display unit displays the MFD/EICAS or MFD/MFD format.
Confirm that the INBD position operates normally:
Set the right PFD/MFD selector to INBD.
Confirm the right inboard display unit displays the PFD/EICAS or PFD/MFD format and the outboard display unit blanks.
Confirm that the OUTBD position operates normally:
Set right PFD/MFD selector to OUTBD.
Confirm the right outboard display unit displays the PFD/MFD format and the inboard display blanks.
Set right PFD/MFD selector to NORM.

OperationNote.Para: In the event of failure of additional display units, Head-Up Display (HUD) may be used to provide PFD information.

RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations require two Primary Flight Displays (PFD) with mini map (2 outboard DUs) and two Multi-Function Display (MFD) (2 inboard DUs) .

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided master brightness control system operates normally.
